items.title: This piece is one of the best stories I've read this year as far as a reporter skillfully and compelling telling a story.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
This piece is one of the best stories I've read this year as far as a reporter skillfully and compelling telling a story. 

The story? A charitable Ohio woman offered her home to two people who she later found out ... were wanted for murder in Maryland.

STORY: www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/202...

media.title: An Ohio woman took in two strangers. Then she saw their ‘wanted’ photos.
media.description: In an era of declining trust, Adrienne Behrman, 49, took a chance on a couple she hoped to help.

items.title: Channing Frye joins The Richard Show | NBA Finals 10-Year Reunion
items.author: Richard A. Jefferson
items.body_excerpt: We all know the 2016 Cavs Reunion Series wouldn’t be complete without my guy Channing Frye! Today we sit down with my 2016 Cleveland Cavaliers teammate and partner in crime to relive some of our favorite memories from the historic 2016 NBA Championship run (yes, you’re welcome),…

media.title: Ira Winderman: ‘A nickel more’ creates an era of change for Heat, but at what price?
media.description: Typically, the spirit of altruism is an after-the-fact sentiment when it comes to the transactional world of the NBA. But it was different for the Miami Heat with Giannis Antetokounmpo.
